findings.title: [Storage / Logistics] Carriacou (Brooklyn) warehouse — NEW storage option; Mendez holding space, needs date/time/# pallets (BLOCKED on securing a truck)
findings.detail: Kendall reached out to Carriacou (Brooklyn; contact Mendez) about storing product there — NOT previously used. Mendez (6/19) confirmed space IS available and needs the final date, time, and # of pallets; Kendall is sending a PO. Can't give those details yet because there is no truck/freight booked. NEXT: once a truck is secured (see the freight items above), send Mendez the date/time/pallets to lock the Brooklyn receiving. Jake also coordinated with Mendez. (owner: Kendall (give Mendez details once a truck is booked); Mendez/Carriacou holding the space)
